record.text:
time is not a line. it is a shape — an angle between two positions.

when a clock stops, the hands do not point. they form a sector.

the stopped clock converts time from duration to geometry. the miss is no longer a gap. it is the shape the gap makes.

images.alt: golden bowtie or hourglass shape on dark background — two triangles meeting at their tips, warm amber and gold tones, clean and minimal
